groups.title: Traffic and signals
groups.description: Traffic light colours, a short quiz, and a mini game — red, amber, and green.

modules.title: Intro
modules.description: Short reference sheet on the standard three-color traffic signal before the quiz.

modules.title: MCQ: color lights
modules.description: Questions focused on red, amber, and green and where to stop.

modules.title: Mini game: match the light
modules.description: Six rounds — tap Stop, Slow / prepare, or Go for the color shown.

groups.title: Warning signs
groups.description: Hazard and caution signs that warn you of conditions ahead.

modules.title: Study: warning signs
modules.description: Read through typical warning signs and what they tell you.

modules.title: MCQ: warning signs
modules.description: Multiple choice on hazard and caution signs.

groups.title: Control signs
groups.description: Signs that give orders, set limits, or show who has priority.

subgroups.title: Restrictive signs
subgroups.description: Prohibitions and limits (no entry, speed, no parking, etc.).

modules.title: Study: restrictive signs
modules.description: What restrictive signs require from drivers.

subgroups.title: Boundary signs
subgroups.description: Signs at edges of zones, traffic types, or road character.

modules.title: Study: boundary signs
modules.description: How boundary-type signs change the rules on a road.

modules.title: MCQ: boundary signs
modules.description: Apply knowledge of zone and layout boundaries.

subgroups.title: Additional signs
subgroups.description: Supplementary plates and extra instructions with other signs.

modules.title: Study: additional signs
modules.description: How supplementary information changes the main sign.

subgroups.title: Command signs
subgroups.description: Mandatory movement — keep left/right, turn only, etc.

modules.title: Study: command signs
modules.description: Blue mandatory signs and what you must do.

subgroups.title: Priority signs
subgroups.description: Stop, give way, main road, and roundabout priority.

modules.title: Study: priority signs
modules.description: Who goes first at junctions and merges.

modules.title: MCQ: priority signs
modules.description: Stop, give way, and priority at junctions.
